question: आंध्र प्रदेश और अरुणाचल प्रदेश राज्यों के लिए, प्रत्येक राज्य का नाम और जिला आईडी की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, बशर्ते कि उस राज्य के लिए जिला आईडी की संख्या कम से कम एक हो।

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्य के लिए, प्रत्येक जिले का नाम और प्रसूति एवं बाल कल्याण केंद्रों की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, कुल संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम (descending order) में व्यवस्थित करें, और केवल शीर्ष 5 जिले दिखाएं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.district_name, SUM(f.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care f ON sd.sub_district_id = f.sub_district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT d.district_name, SUM(f.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total
FROM dim_state s
JOIN dim_district d ON s.state_id = d.state_id
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care f ON sd.sub_district_id = f.sub_district_id
WHERE s.state_name ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY d.district_name
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT d.district_id, SUM(fp.rural_population) AS total_rural_population, SUM(fp.scheduled_tribes_rural_population) AS total_scheduled_tribes_rural_population
FROM dim_district d
JOIN dim_sub_district sd ON d.district_id = sd.district_id
JOIN fact_population fp ON sd.sub_district_id = fp.sub_district_id
GROUP BY d.district_id
ORDER BY total_rural_population DESC;
